name: Chicken Da Vinci
recipeIngredient: 2 Boneless Chicken Breasts, Cut into thin strips
1 Onion, sliced thick or cut into chunks
1 lb Italian Sausages, Sliced into rounds about ½-inch Thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Italian sausages until done and remove from the pan.
2. In the remaining grease from the sausages, add olive oil as needed.
3. Saute the garlic and green peppers until they are about half cooked.
4. Add the onion and cook until the vegetables are barely tender, still a bit crisp, but not browned.
5. Remove the vegetables from the pan and add them to the sausages.
6. Add more oil and saute the mushrooms until they are browned. Remove and add to the rest of the ingredients.
7. Finally, saute the chicken until it is done.
8. Return everything back into the pan.
9. Season generously with rosemary and oregano. Adding a little basil won't hurt either.
10. If the dish seems dry, add small amounts of plain chicken broth or a mix of broth and white wine.
11. If you've added too much liquid, thicken it with cornstarch.
